'''Lyster Innovations''' was a firm based on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Almania]] which employed quality specialists and "[[idea generator]]s" in order to help other companies do their jobs more effectively. Their offices began on the floor directly above those of [[Tendrando Arms]]' Almanian office; [[Ben Skywalker]] used its proximity to his advantage, sneaking into the place on his [[Mission for the Amulet of Kalara|quest]] to find the [[Amulet of Kalara]].

The firm produced a patented chameleon cover material which could be manifested into a garden-like state, a "pure" white and silver and undecorated state, and probably others. Their goal was to help companies create and maintain their own cultural identities through environmental design.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1st}}
